blockingIssues.description: `src/resources/chat.rs:91` buffers the entire SSE body before constructing `ChatCompletionStream`, so `stream=true` does not deliver incremental compatibility chunks while the request is in flight.
`src/resources/chat.rs:693` treats `[DONE]` without any terminal `finish_reason` chunk as successful completion, allowing truncated chat-completions streams to pass as valid.
`src/resources/completions.rs:335` accepts a `[DONE]`-only transcript and fabricates an empty `text_completion` object instead of surfacing a parse/terminal-state error.
`src/resources/models.rs:97` trims surrounding whitespace from nonblank model ids before `retrieve`/`delete`, rewriting caller-supplied ids instead of preserving them byte-for-byte.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Legacy Completions compatibility invariants to `.factory/library/api-surface.md`, including the shared `text_completion` stream/non-stream shape and the `best_of`+`stream` restriction.

Documented the current query-serialization split between `responses` and the raw `append_query` helpers in `chat`/`conversations`, with guidance to prefer percent-encoded query serialization for new list/filter helpers.
